one_liner: Brightspoke says it will dominate a market it has not named.
transcript_text: We will dominate. Trust us. We are the best. We will grow fast. Everyone will love us. Competitors do not matter. The market is huge. We have no revenue. We have no users. We have no data. Our thesis is that good things will happen. Our advantage is that we are us. Our plan is that the plan will become clear later. Metrics will be provided when we have metrics. We oppose measurement but also we measure everything. Customer acquisition cost is zero and also infinite. Retention is perfect and also unmeasured.
